      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch runnaja trihs
tuhkſtoſchus fakkanis Wahr-
dus/ un winna Dſeesmas bija
tuhkſtoſchas un peezaſ."
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch runnaja no
teem Kohſeem/ (un fahze) no ta
Zeedra-Kohka/ kas ceckch Lihba-
nus irr/ lihds tam Ihsapam/ kas
pee Seenas isaug. Wiꞥſch run-
naja arri no Swehreem/ un no
Putneem/ un no Tahrpeem/ un
no Stwim."
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un no wiꞥſahm Tautahm
nahze Salamanza Gudribu dsir-
deht/ no wiꞥſeem Semnes Keh-
niſeem/ kas no winna Gudribas
bij dsirDejscht."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta V. Nodalla.
Frans tas Kehniſsch no Tirus apdraudsina,
jahs ar Salamanu : 1. Un fuhta winnam
Zeedra-Kohkus ta KUNGA Nammu ustai.
ſiht:7/8. Un falihdsinajahs abbi fawa Starpâ
tahs Maksas pehz : 9. Salamans iſlaha
weenu leelu Pulku Strahdneeku pee ta Nam,
ma Uſtaiſſchanas : 13.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N frans tas Kehniſsch

Kalpus pee Salamanu.
(Jo wiꞥſch bij dsirdejs/ ka tee-
wiꞥſu bij par Kehniſu fwatiſ-

frans bij Dahwidu allachin
imblejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz fuhtiſa Salamans

"

    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu finni/ ka mans Tehws
bwids ne warreja ta KUN-
faw. Deewa Wahrdam

      "n": 4,

      "text": "Un nu irr tas KUNG-

"

    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un raugt/ es dohmaju

wa Weeta us tawu Got-

    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pawehli nu/ ka t

"
